# Standard search engines
# -----------------------------------------------
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /

User-agent: facebookexternalhit
Allow: /

# -----------------------------------------------
# AI crawlers — explicitly allowed
# -----------------------------------------------

# OpenAI / ChatGPT
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

# Anthropic / Claude
User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

# Perplexity
User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

# Google AI (Gemini training / AI Overviews)
User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

# Common Crawl (used to train many AI models)
User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

# -----------------------------------------------
# Everyone else
# -----------------------------------------------
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# -----------------------------------------------
# Sitemap
# -----------------------------------------------
Sitemap: https://sudskiprevodimk.com/sitemap.xml
